mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member) AS totalMembers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE status = 'ACTIVE') AS activeMembers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book) AS totalBooks, (SELECT SUM(available_copies) FROM book) AS availableBooks, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental) AS totalRentals, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental WHERE status IN ('RENTED', 'OVERDUE')) AS currentRentals, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rental WHERE status = 'OVERDUE') AS overdueRentals

SELECT YEAR(rental_date) AS year, MONTH(rental_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS totalRentals, SUM(CASE WHEN return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalReturns, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueCount FROM rental WHERE YEAR(rental_date) = #{year} GROUP BY YEAR(rental_date), MONTH(rental_date) ORDER BY month

SELECT b.book_id AS bookId, b.title, b.author, b.genre, b.file_path AS filePath, b.file_name AS fileName, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rentalCount, COALESCE(AVG(rv.rating), 0) AS averageRating FROM book b LEFT JOIN rental r ON b.book_id = r.book_id LEFT JOIN review rv ON b.book_id = rv.book_id GROUP BY b.book_id, b.title, b.author, b.genre, b.file_path, b.file_name ORDER BY rentalCount DESC, averageRating DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.rental_id AS rentalId, m.member_id AS memberId, m.name AS memberName, m.email AS memberEmail, m.phone AS memberPhone, b.book_id AS bookId, b.title AS bookTitle, r.rental_date AS rentalDate, r.due_date AS dueDate FROM rental r INNER JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id INNER JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.book_id WHERE r.status = 'OVERDUE' ORDER BY r.due_date ASC

SELECT YEAR(rental_date) AS year, MONTH(rental_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS totalRentals, SUM(CASE WHEN return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS totalReturns, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'OVERDUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdueCount FROM rental WHERE member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY YEAR(rental_date), MONTH(rental_date) ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC LIMIT 12
